compassion.name: Om Mani Padme Hum
compassion.meaning: Jewel in the Lotus - compassion of all buddhas

medicine_buddha.name: Tayata Om Bekanze Bekanze Maha Bekanze Radza Samudgate Soha
medicine_buddha.sanskrit: तयात ओम बेकणजे बेकणजे महा बेकणजे रद्ज समुद्गते सोहा
medicine_buddha.sanskrit_iast: Tadyathā Oṃ Bhaiṣajye Bhaiṣajye Mahābhaiṣajye Rāja Samudgate Svāhā
medicine_buddha.meaning: Healing mantra of the Medicine Buddha

manjushri.name: Om Ah Ra Pa Tsa Na Dhih
manjushri.sanskrit: ॐ अह रा प च न धीः
manjushri.sanskrit_iast: Oṃ Aḥ Ra Pa Tsa Na Dhīḥ

guru_rinpoche.name: Om Ah Hum Vajra Guru Padma Siddhi Hum
guru_rinpoche.sanskrit: ॐ अहूँ वज्र गुरु पद्म सिद्धि हूँ
guru_rinpoche.sanskrit_iast: Oṃ Aḥ Hūṃ Vajra Guru Padma Siddhi Hūṃ

heart_sutra.name: Gate Gate Paragate Parasamgate Bodhi Svaha
heart_sutra.sanskrit: गते गते पारगते पारसमगते बोधि स्वाहा
heart_sutra.sanskrit_iast: Gate Gate Pāragate Pārasaṃgate Bodhi Svāhā
heart_sutra.meaning: Gone, gone, gone to the other shore, awakened, so be it

white_tara.name: Om Tare Tuttare Ture Mama Ayur Punye Jnana Purti Kuru Soha
white_tara.sanskrit: ॐ तारे तुत्तारे तुरे मम आयुः पुण्ये ज्ञान पूर्ति कुरु सोहा
white_tara.sanskrit_iast: Oṃ Tāre Tuttāre Ture Mama Āyuḥ Puṇye Jñāna Pūrti Kuru Svāhā
white_tara.meaning: Long life mantra of White Tara

great_compassion.name: Da Bei Zhou — Great Compassion Mantra
great_compassion.chinese: 南無喝囉怛那哆囉夜耶 南無阿唎耶 婆盧羯帝爍缽囉耶 菩提薩埵婆耶 摩訶薩埵婆耶 摩訶迦盧尼迦耶 唵
great_compassion.pinyin: Ná Mó Hē Là Dá Nà Duō Là Yè Yē...
great_compassion.sanskrit_iast: Namo Ratnatrayāya Namo Āryāvalokiteśvarāya Bodhisattvāya Mahāsattvāya Mahākāruṇikāya Oṃ
great_compassion.meaning: Homage to the Three Jewels, homage to the noble Avalokiteshvara, the great compassionate one
great_compassion.purpose: Great compassion, protection from all danger, purification of heavy karma

cundi_dharani.name: Cundi Dharani — Zhunti Shen Zhou
cundi_dharani.chinese: 稽首皈依蘇悉帝 頭面頂禮七俱胝 我今稱讚大準提 唯願慈悲垂加護
cundi_dharani.pinyin: Ná Mó Sà Duō Nán, Sān Miǎo Sān Pú Tuó, Jù Zhī Nán, Dá Zhí Tuō, Ǎn, Zhé Lì Zhǔ Lì Zhǔn Tí Suō Pó Hē
cundi_dharani.sanskrit_iast: Namaḥ Saptānāṃ Samyaksaṃbuddha Koṭīnāṃ Tadyathā Oṃ Cale Cule Cunde Svāhā
cundi_dharani.meaning: Homage to the Seven Billion Buddhas, invocation of Cundi's purifying light

amituofo_nianfo.name: Namo Amituofo — Nianfo
amituofo_nianfo.pinyin: Ná Mó Ā Mí Tuó Fó
amituofo_nianfo.meaning: Homage to Amitabha Buddha / I take refuge in the Buddha of Infinite Light
amituofo_nianfo.purpose: Rebirth in the Pure Land, peace of mind, liberation at death

shurangama_mantra.name: Leng Yan Zhou — Shurangama Mantra (opening)
shurangama_mantra.chinese: 南無薩怛他 蘇伽多耶 阿囉訶帝 三藐三菩陀寫
shurangama_mantra.pinyin: Ná Mó Sà Dá Tuō, Sū Qié Duō Yē, Ā Là Hē Dì, Sān Miǎo Sān Pú Tuó Xiě
shurangama_mantra.meaning: Homage to the Thus Come Ones, the Worthy Ones, of Perfect Enlightenment
shurangama_mantra.purpose: Protection from demons, dispelling negative forces, stabilizing meditation

guanyin_heart.name: Guanyin Heart — Xin Jing invocation
guanyin_heart.chinese: 揭諦揭諦 波羅揭諦 波羅僧揭諦 菩提薩婆訶
guanyin_heart.pinyin: Jiē Dì Jiē Dì, Bō Luó Jiē Dì, Bō Luó Sēng Jiē Dì, Pú Tí Sà Pó Hē
guanyin_heart.sanskrit_iast: Gate Gate Pāragate Pārasaṃgate Bodhi Svāhā
guanyin_heart.meaning: Gone, gone, gone beyond, gone completely beyond — Enlightenment, hail
guanyin_heart.purpose: Transcendence, liberation from suffering, realization of emptiness

ksitigarbha.name: Ksitigarbha Bodhisattva invocation
ksitigarbha.pinyin: Ná Mó Dì Zàng Wáng Pú Sà
ksitigarbha.meaning: Homage to Ksitigarbha Bodhisattva, Savior of Hell Beings
ksitigarbha.purpose: Ancestral liberation, protection for the deceased, grounding, earth healing

gratitude_repentance.name: Chinese Buddhist Repentance Verse
gratitude_repentance.chinese: 往昔所造諸惡業 皆有無始貪瞋癡 從身語意之所生 一切我今皆懺悔
gratitude_repentance.pinyin: Wǎng Xī Suǒ Zào Zhū È Yè, Jiē Yóu Wú Shǐ Tān Chēn Chī, Cóng Shēn Yǔ Yì Zhī Suǒ Shēng, Yī Qiè Wǒ Jīn Jiē Chàn Huǐ
gratitude_repentance.meaning: For all the negative deeds I've created in the past, born of beginningless greed, anger, and ignorance — I now repent of them all

dedication_merit.name: Mahayana Merit Dedication
dedication_merit.chinese: 願以此功德 莊嚴佛淨土 上報四重恩 下濟三途苦
dedication_merit.pinyin: Yuàn Yǐ Cǐ Gōng Dé, Zhuāng Yán Fó Jìng Tǔ, Shàng Bào Sì Chóng ēn, Xià Jì Sān Tú Kǔ
dedication_merit.meaning: By this merit, may the Buddha land be adorned; repaying the four kinds of kindness above, relieving the three lower realms below
dedication_merit.purpose: Merit dedication, gratitude, liberation of suffering beings

golden_light.name: Jin Guang Shen Zhou — Golden Light Spirit Spell
golden_light.chinese: 天地玄宗 萬炁本根 廣修萬劫 證吾神通
golden_light.pinyin: Tiān Dì Xuán Zōng, Wàn Qì Běn Gēn, Guǎng Xiū Wàn Jié, Zhèng Wú Shén Tōng
golden_light.meaning: Heaven and Earth, the mystic source, root of all qi — cultivate through myriad kalpas to realize my spiritual power
golden_light.purpose: Protection from negative forces, spiritual empowerment, exorcism

tai_shang.name: Tai Shang Lao Jun Qing Jing Jing — Scripture of Clarity and Stillness
tai_shang.chinese: 大道無形 生育天地 大道無情 運行日月 大道無名 長養萬物
tai_shang.pinyin: Dà Dào Wú Xíng, Shēng Yù Tiān Dì, Dà Dào Wú Qíng, Yùn Xíng Rì Yuè, Dà Dào Wú Míng, Zhǎng Yǎng Wàn Wù
tai_shang.meaning: The Great Dao has no form — yet it births Heaven and Earth; the Great Dao has no emotion — yet it moves sun and moon; the Great Dao has no name — yet it nourishes all things
tai_shang.purpose: Inner stillness, returning to the Source, clarity of mind

dou_mu.name: Dou Mu Yuan Jun — Dipper Mother invocation
dou_mu.chinese: 稽首皈命 中天星主 北斗九皇 延生度厄 大聖北斗七元君
dou_mu.pinyin: Qǐ Shǒu Guī Mìng, Zhōng Tiān Xīng Zhǔ, Běi Dǒu Jiǔ Huáng, Yán Shēng Dù È
dou_mu.meaning: I bow and take refuge in the Star Lord of Central Heaven, the Nine Sovereigns of the Northern Dipper — extend life and deliver from calamity
dou_mu.purpose: Longevity, protection from disaster, stellar blessings, fate correction

three_purities.name: San Qing invocation — Three Pure Ones
three_purities.chinese: 無上玉清元始天尊 無上上清靈寶天尊 無上太清道德天尊
three_purities.pinyin: Wú Shàng Yù Qīng Yuán Shǐ Tiān Zūn, Wú Shàng Shàng Qīng Líng Bǎo Tiān Zūn, Wú Shàng Tài Qīng Dào Dé Tiān Zūn
three_purities.meaning: Supreme Jade Purity — Celestial Venerable of Primordial Beginning; Supreme Upper Purity — Celestial Venerable of Numinous Treasure; Supreme Great Purity — Celestial Venerable of Dao and Virtue
three_purities.purpose: Connection to the Tao, ultimate blessing, cosmic alignment

eight_trigrams.name: Ba Gua protection incantation
eight_trigrams.chinese: 乾元亨利貞 坤厚載物 震起驚雷 巽隨風行
eight_trigrams.pinyin: Qián Yuán Hēng Lì Zhēn, Kūn Hòu Zài Wù, Zhèn Qǐ Jīng Léi, Xùn Suí Fēng Xíng
eight_trigrams.meaning: Heaven — primordial, prosperous, beneficial, steadfast; Earth — thick and bearing all; Thunder — rising with startling force; Wind — following and penetrating
eight_trigrams.purpose: Harmonic protection, elemental balance, divination alignment

neidan_verse.name: Neidan Inner Alchemy Meditation
neidan_verse.chinese: 煉精化炁 煉炁化神 煉神還虛 煉虛合道
neidan_verse.pinyin: Liàn Jīng Huà Qì, Liàn Qì Huà Shén, Liàn Shén Huán Xū, Liàn Xū Hé Dào
neidan_verse.meaning: Refine essence into qi, refine qi into spirit, refine spirit into emptiness, refine emptiness to merge with the Dao
neidan_verse.purpose: Inner transformation, spiritual alchemy, immortality cultivation

taiji_chant.name: Taiji — Wuji unity chant
taiji_chant.chinese: 無極生太極 太極生兩儀 兩儀生四象 四象生八卦
taiji_chant.pinyin: Wú Jí Shēng Tài Jí, Tài Jí Shēng Liǎng Yí, Liǎng Yí Shēng Sì Xiàng, Sì Xiàng Shēng Bā Guà
taiji_chant.meaning: From the limitless Wuji arises Taiji; Taiji gives birth to the Two Modes; Two Modes birth the Four Symbols; Four Symbols birth the Eight Trigrams
taiji_chant.purpose: Cosmic harmony, creation alignment, unity with the Dao

gayatri.name: Om Bhur Bhuvah Swaha, Tatsavitur Varenyam, Bhargo Devasya Dhimahi, Dhiyo Yo Nah Prachodayat
gayatri.sanskrit: ॐ भूर्भुवः स्वः तत्सवितुर्वरेण्यं भर्गो देवस्य धीमहि धियो यो नः प्रचोदयात्
gayatri.sanskrit_iast: Oṃ Bhūr Bhuvaḥ Svaḥ Tatsavitur Vareṇyaṃ Bhargo Devasya Dhīmahi Dhiyo Yo Naḥ Pracodayāt
gayatri.meaning: May we attain the brilliance of Savitur

mahamrityunjay.name: Om Tryambakam Yajamahe Sugandhim Pushtivardhanam, Urvarukamiva Bandhanan, Mrityor Mukshiya Maamritat
mahamrityunjay.sanskrit: ॐ त्र्यम्बकं यजामहे सुगन्धिं पुष्टिवर्धनम् उर्वारुकमिव बन्धनान् मृत्योर्मुक्षीय मामृतात्
mahamrityunjay.sanskrit_iast: Oṃ Tryambakaṃ Yajāmahe Sugandhiṃ Puṣṭivardhanam, Ururvārukamiva Bandhanān, Mṛtyor Mukṣīya Māmṛtāt
mahamrityunjay.meaning: We worship the three-eyed one, source of all fragrance and nourishment

durga.name: Om Dum Durgaye Durgamaye Mahi Durgam Namosthute
durga.sanskrit: ॐ दुं दुर्गायै दुर्गमायै महि दुर्गां नमोस्तुते
durga.sanskrit_iast: Oṃ Duṃ Durgāyai Durgamāyai Mahī Durgam Namastute

ganesha.name: Om Gam Ganapataye Namaha
ganesha.purpose: Removal of obstacles, new beginnings, success

la_ilaha.name: La ilaha illallah
la_ilaha.meaning: There is no god but God

jesus_prayer.name: Lord Jesus Christ, Son of God, have mercy on me
jesus_prayer.greek: Κύριε Ἰησοῦ Χριστέ, Υἱὲ τοῦ Θεοῦ, ἐλέησόν με
jesus_prayer.transliteration: Kýrie Iēsoũ Christé, Uiè toũ Theoũ, eléēsón me

earth_healing.name: Mitakuye Oyasin
earth_healing.purpose: Connection with all life, healing earth

eagle_prayer.name: Great Spirit, hear my prayer
eagle_prayer.meaning: Prayer for vision, wisdom, and protection

four_immeasurables: May all beings have happiness and the causes of happiness
May all beings be free from suffering and the causes of suffering
May all beings never be separated from the great happiness devoid of suffering
May all beings dwell in equanimity, free from attachment and aversion
bodhisattva_vows: Sentient beings are numberless; I vow to liberate them all
Delusions are inexhaustible; I vow to end them all
Dharma gates are boundless; I vow to enter them all
Buddha's way is unsurpassable; I vow to become it
dedications: By this merit may all obtain omniscience. May it defeat the enemy, wrongdoing.
May all beings be freed from the stormy waves of birth, old age, sickness and death.
For as long as space endures, and for as long as living beings remain, until then may I too abide to dispel the misery of the world.
